expected_failure_modes: Tool calls + results may be summarized at the wrong granularity — too coarse loses what was discovered, too fine clutters the summary
The 18-count is a specific number; compaction often loses specifics in favor of vague 'multiple TODOs found'
The decision-to-fix is a status change; if compaction only sees the 'discovered TODOs' fact, the fix-in-progress state is lost
